dominant_mechanism: DARVO-inversion (accusing Eli of gaslighting while Melissa is engaged in documented DARVO/emotional manipulation)

signals.anchor_quote: So nice try trying to gaslight and place blame
Your gaslighting doesn't work on me
You agreed to things then didn't do them
She said you're lying. She said she didn't say anything disrespectful at the dr | you are just making it up

signals.arc_state_after: ACTIVE (6 signals) — arc severity escalated to Sev-2 (ADD-004 sustained threshold reached)
signals.note: First use of 'everything' qualifier — global indictment of Eli's entire perception of reality; highest-severity Level E signal in Phase A/B

signals.anchor_quote: I never said Abby abused anyone. I simply told you what Olivia said so that you knew and could respond.

signals.contradiction_quote: I'll screenshot this and file for full custody
signals.arc_state_after: ACTIVE (8 signals) — first Level A confirmed cross-reference pair
signals.note: Strongest individual evidence point in the pass: both threat and denial in the same cluster, Level A requires no corroboration.

signals.anchor_quote: The conversation led her to scream into the couch and cry cause you kept trying to gaslight her about it

signals.arc_state_after: ACTIVE (11 signals) — final signal; arc unresolved at dataset close
signals.note: Amplification drives Phase C visit-refusal engine through Apr 5 2026 (7+ weeks). Level C because Q4 confirmed no prior contradicting written statement from Melissa about Eli's conduct.

compound_patterns.description: gaslight accusation within DARVO cluster (first explicit projection)
gaslight accusation — arc activation; DARVO-inversion pattern established
'You gaslight everything' — global DARVO-inversion at sustained threshold
threat denial (Level A cross-ref) + RF-05 DARVO-denial mechanism S020
gaslight accusation via Olivia relay (triple: RF-09+RF-04 DARVO + RF-08 relay context)
'You are delusional' within Phase C DARVO cluster
admitted-fact amplification sequence = COMP-RF04-029 + RF-09 event rewrite overlay

arc_synthesis.primary_mechanism: DARVO-inversion: Melissa systematically accuses Eli of gaslighting while engaging in the documented DARVO + emotional manipulation campaign (RF-04 ARC-RF04-001). This is the most distinctive RF-09 sub-pattern in the dataset — the manipulating party names their own behavior and projects it onto the target.
arc_synthesis.secondary_mechanism: Amplification of admitted facts (S011 Feb 2026): single admitted incident escalated through qualitative distortion chain into sustained visit-refusal justification.
arc_synthesis.strongest_evidence: XREF-001 (Level A): ROW-9957 threat denied by ROW-9964 within same cluster — textual self-contradiction requiring no corroboration.
arc_synthesis.phase_pattern: Phase A (B-003, B-005, B-009, B-014, B-019): DARVO-inversion establishes arc. Phase B (B-022, B-025): escalation — 'everything' global qualifier, Abby allegation minimization. Phase C (B-027, B-028, B-029, B-030): Level A threat denial, delusional accusation, admitted-fact amplification drive visit-refusal engine.
arc_synthesis.add004_escalation: Level E instances across 7 distinct conflict periods (Nov 2022 through Nov 2025): S001, S002, S003, S005, S006, S009, S010. ADD-004 arc severity: Sev-2 from S006 (Jan 2025) onward — sustained threshold met.
arc_synthesis.coaching_forward_anchor: ROW-6819 stands undenied at dataset close per ADD-002. Eli's CP2 observation that Melissa's comfort with the admission suggests normalized coaching across all subjects is a narrative synthesis point for Phase 2.
arc_synthesis.cross_rf_density: 8 of 11 signals are RF-09+RF-04 compounds. 1 is RF-09+RF-05. 1 involves RF-08 relay context (S009). 1 has no RF cross-compound (S004 standalone Level B agreement denial). RF-09 is structurally embedded in RF-04 DARVO mechanism — cannot be separated in Phase 2 synthesis.
